name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, develop ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main, develop ]

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '18'

jobs:
  setup:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      affected-packages: ${{ steps.affected.outputs.packages }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Get affected packages
        id: affected
        run: |
          if [ "${{ github.event_name }}" = "pull_request" ]; then
            AFFECTED=$(npx nx print-affected --base=origin/main --select=projects)
          else
            AFFECTED=$(npx nx run-many --target=build --all --parallel --skip-nx-cache --dry-run | grep "nx run" | sed 's/.*nx run \([^:]*\):.*/\1/' | sort | uniq | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//')
          fi
          echo "packages=$AFFECTED" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

  quality-gates:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: setup
    if: needs.setup.outputs.affected-packages != ''
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: ESLint
        run: npx nx run-many --target=lint --parallel --all

      - name: Prettier Check
        run: npx prettier --check "**/*.{ts,js,json,md,yml,yaml}"

      - name: TypeScript Check
        run: npx nx run-many --target=typecheck --parallel --all

  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [setup, quality-gates]
    if: needs.setup.outputs.affected-packages != ''
    strategy:
      matrix:
        package: ['timing', 'scheduling', 'devices', 'forgescript']
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build ${{ matrix.package }}
        run: npx nx build ${{ matrix.package }}

      - name: Cache build artifacts
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: |
            dist/packages/${{ matrix.package }}
            node_modules/.cache
          key: build-${{ matrix.package }}-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            build-${{ matrix.package }}-

  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: setup
    if: needs.setup.outputs.affected-packages != ''
    strategy:
      matrix:
        package: ['timing', 'scheduling', 'devices', 'forgescript']
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Test ${{ matrix.package }}
        run: npx nx test ${{ matrix.package }} --coverage --watchAll=false

      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v3
        with:
          file: ./coverage/packages/${{ matrix.package }}/lcov.info
          flags: ${{ matrix.package }}
          name: ${{ matrix.package }}-coverage

  integration-tests:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, test]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Restore build artifacts
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: |
            dist/packages
            node_modules/.cache
          key: build-timing-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            build-timing-

      - name: Run integration tests
        run: npx nx run-many --target=test:integration --parallel --all

  performance-tests:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, test]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run performance benchmarks
        run: npx nx run-many --target=benchmark --parallel --all

      - name: Performance regression check
        run: |
          # Compare performance metrics against baseline
          # This will be implemented with specific benchmark tooling
          echo "Performance regression analysis (placeholder)"

  security-scan:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: setup
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Audit dependencies
        run: npm audit --audit-level=moderate

      - name: CodeQL Analysis
        uses: github/codeql-action/init@v2
        with:
          languages: typescript, javascript

      - name: Perform CodeQL Analysis
        uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@v2

  workspace-validation:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: setup
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Validate workspace dependencies
        run: |
          # Check for circular dependencies
          npx nx graph --file=dep-graph.json
          
          # Validate package.json dependencies match actual usage
          npx depcheck --json > depcheck-results.json || true
          
          # Check for workspace path mapping issues
          npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck

      - name: Upload dependency graph
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: dependency-graph
          path: dep-graph.json

  release:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, test, integration-tests, performance-tests, security-scan, workspace-validation]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build all packages
        run: npx nx run-many --target=build --all --parallel

      - name: Generate release notes
        run: |
          # This will be implemented with proper release tooling
          echo "Release notes generation (placeholder)"

      - name: Publish to npm (dry run)
        run: |
          # Configure for actual publishing when ready
          echo "NPM publish (placeholder - dry run mode)"
          # npx nx run-many --target=publish --all

        uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@v2

  workspace-validation:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: setup
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Validate workspace dependencies
        run: |
          # Check for circular dependencies
          npx nx graph --file=dep-graph.json
          
          # Validate package.json dependencies match actual usage
          npx depcheck --json > depcheck-results.json || true
          
          # Check for workspace path mapping issues
          npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck

      - name: Upload dependency graph
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: dependency-graph
          path: dep-graph.json

  release:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, test, integration-tests, performance-tests, security-scan, workspace-validation]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build all packages
        run: npx nx run-many --target=build --all --parallel

      - name: Generate release notes
        run: |
          # This will be implemented with proper release tooling

      - name: Publish to npm (dry run)
        run: |
          # Configure for actual publishing when ready
          echo "NPM publish (placeholder - dry run mode)"

name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, develop]

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '20'
  NX_CLOUD_DISTRIBUTED_EXECUTION: false

jobs:
  setup:
    name: Setup & Cache
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      nx-cache-key: ${{ steps.nx-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Cache Nx workspace
        id: nx-cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .nx/cache
            node_modules/.cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-nx-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('nx.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-nx-

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

  lint-and-format:
    name: Lint & Format Check
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: setup
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Restore Nx cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .nx/cache
            node_modules/.cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-nx-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('nx.json') }}

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run ESLint
        run: npm run lint

      - name: Check Prettier formatting
        run: npm run format:check

  typecheck:
    name: TypeScript Type Check
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: setup
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Restore Nx cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .nx/cache
            node_modules/.cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-nx-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('nx.json') }}

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run TypeScript type checking
        run: npm run typecheck

  test:
    name: Unit & Integration Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: setup
    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: ['18', '20', '22']
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Restore Nx cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .nx/cache
            node_modules/.cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-nx-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('nx.json') }}

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run tests with coverage
        run: npm run test:ci

      - name: Upload coverage reports to Codecov
        if: matrix.node-version == '20'
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          directory: ./coverage
          fail_ci_if_error: true
          verbose: true

  build:
    name: Build All Packages
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [lint-and-format, typecheck, test]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Restore Nx cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .nx/cache
            node_modules/.cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-nx-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('nx.json') }}

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build all packages
        run: npm run build:all

      - name: Cache build artifacts
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            packages/*/dist
            apps/*/dist
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ github.sha }}

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: setup
    permissions:
      actions: read
      contents: read
      security-events: write
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run npm audit
        run: npm audit --audit-level moderate

      - name: Initialize CodeQL
        uses: github/codeql-action/init@v3
        with:
          languages: javascript-typescript

      - name: Perform CodeQL Analysis
        uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@v3

  performance-tests:
    name: Performance Regression Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Restore Nx cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .nx/cache
            node_modules/.cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-nx-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('nx.json') }}

      - name: Restore build artifacts
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            packages/*/dist
            apps/*/dist
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ github.sha }}

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run timing precision tests
        run: |
          echo "Running timing precision validation..."
          # TODO: Add actual performance regression tests
          # npm run test:performance

  deploy-dev:
    name: Deploy to Development
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, security-scan]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/develop' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: development
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Restore build artifacts
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            packages/*/dist
            apps/*/dist
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ github.sha }}

      - name: Deploy to development environment
        run: |
          echo "Deploying to development environment..."
          # TODO: Add actual deployment commands
          # npm run deploy:dev

  release:
    name: Release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, security-scan]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: production
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Restore build artifacts
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            packages/*/dist
            apps/*/dist
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ github.sha }}

      - name: Create Release
        run: |
          echo "Creating release..."
          # TODO: Add release automation
          # npm run release
